---
title: "Contents: _R Blog_"
subtitle: "Package Updates and News"
date: today
date-modified: today
listing:
  contents: posts
  sort: "date desc"
  type: table
  fields: [date-modified, date, title, subtitle, reading-time]
  field-display-names:
    date: "Published"
    date-modified: "Edited"  
  categories: true
  sort-ui: true
  filter-ui: true
  feed: 
    title: "Blog from R for Photobiology" 
    items: 8
    type: "partial"
page-layout: full
title-block-banner: true
---
